_comment: Government-set price ceilings for basket items that currently have one (verified as standing, year-round ceilings — NOT the short-lived festive 'Skim Harga Maksimum Musim Perayaan' lists, which are excluded). KPDN does not publish these as open/machine-readable data — no API, no data.gov.my dataset — so values are hand-entered from press coverage and must be re-verified/updated if policy changes. Each entry carries a `verdict` (VERIFIED = an exact RM figure + date is corroborated by a specific cited article; REPORTED = the figure is credibly reported but the start date or source is less precise). Matched to basket items by `key`. Re-check before publishing campaign material, same discipline as issues.json/muda_stances.json.

minyak.label_bm: Harga siling minyak masak paket bersubsidi
minyak.label_en: Subsidised 1kg packet cooking oil price ceiling
minyak.since_note: Long-running subsidised-oil scheme; exact start date not independently verified. Reported still enforced as of June 2026 (KPDN deactivated 179 companies from the eCOSS distribution system for violations, 12 Jun 2026).

beras.since_note: Reported unchanged for approximately 17 years as of the source article (~2009).
